title: lomatium thompsonii
intro: Lomatium thompsonii, also known as Thompson's lomatium, is a perennial herb native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It is a member of the carrot family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions, and is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Lomatium thompsonii can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infused oils.
